definition: To work jointly with others or together, especially in an intellectual endeavor.
example: Researchers from several top universities decided to collaborate on the project.
exampleTranslation: Các nhà nghiên cứu từ một số trường đại học hàng đầu đã quyết định hợp tác trong dự án.

definition: To try to reach an agreement or compromise by discussion with others.
example: Our sales representative managed to negotiate a highly favorable supply contract.
exampleTranslation: Đại diện bán hàng của chúng tôi đã xoay sở để đàm phán được một hợp đồng cung cấp rất có lợi.

definition: To buy or obtain an asset or object, or to learn a new skill.
definitionNative: Mua lại, đạt được, thâu tóm
example: The tech giant plans to acquire a promising artificial intelligence startup.
exampleTranslation: Gã khổng lồ công nghệ có kế hoạch mua lại một công ty khởi nghiệp trí tuệ nhân tạo đầy hứa hẹn.

definition: To bring to an end; close or conclude.
definitionNative: Chấm dứt, hủy bỏ, hoàn thành
example: Either party has the right to terminate the contract with a 30-day written notice.
exampleTranslation: Bất kỳ bên nào cũng có quyền chấm dứt hợp đồng với thông báo bằng văn bản trước 30 ngày.

definition: To act in accordance with a wish, command, rule, or instruction.
example: All factories must comply with environmental protection standards.
exampleTranslation: Tất cả các nhà máy phải tuân thủ các tiêu chuẩn bảo vệ môi trường.

definition: An official order or commission to do something.
example: The government issued a mandate requiring all employees to wear masks.
exampleTranslation: Chính phủ đã ban hành chỉ thị yêu cầu tất cả nhân viên phải đeo khẩu trang.

definition: Combine or cause to combine to form a single entity.
example: The two local banks decided to merge to improve market competitiveness.
exampleTranslation: Hai ngân hàng địa phương đã quyết định sáp nhập để nâng cao khả năng cạnh tranh trên thị trường.

definition: A person or organization officially attached to a larger body.
definitionNative: Công ty liên kết, đại lý liên kết
example: Our company has a local affiliate in Tokyo to manage East Asian operations.
exampleTranslation: Công ty chúng tôi có một chi nhánh liên kết địa phương tại Tokyo để quản lý các hoạt động ở Đông Á.

definition: An instance of buying or selling something; a business deal.
definitionNative: Giao dịch, công việc kinh doanh
example: The online transaction was completed within a few seconds.
exampleTranslation: Giao dịch trực tuyến đã hoàn tất trong vòng vài giây.

definition: A particular and separate article, stipulation, or proviso in a treaty, bill, or contract.
example: The termination clause specifies the penalties for breaking the contract early.
exampleTranslation: Điều khoản chấm dứt quy định các hình phạt đối với việc phá vỡ hợp đồng sớm.

definition: Prepare the preliminary version of a document.
example: The legal team will draft a new sales agreement by Friday.
exampleTranslation: Đội ngũ pháp lý sẽ soạn thảo một hợp đồng bán hàng mới trước thứ Sáu.

definition: Compel observance of or compliance with a law, rule, or obligation.
definitionNative: Thi hành, bắt buộc, áp đặt
example: It is the manager's responsibility to enforce office policies.
exampleTranslation: Trách nhiệm của người quản lý là thực thi các chính sách của văn phòng.

definition: A punishment imposed for breaking a law, rule, or contract.
example: There is a penalty for late payment of the credit card bill.
exampleTranslation: Có hình phạt cho việc thanh toán trễ hạn hóa đơn thẻ tín dụng.

definition: Not valid or legally binding.
definitionNative: Không có hiệu lực, trống rỗng
example: The contract becomes null and void if any terms are violated.
exampleTranslation: Hợp đồng sẽ trở nên vô hiệu nếu bất kỳ điều khoản nào bị vi phạm.

definition: Imposing a legal obligation.
example: The signed document constitutes a legally binding agreement.
exampleTranslation: Tài liệu đã ký cấu thành một thỏa thuận ràng buộc về mặt pháp lý.

definition: Resume or re-establish an activity, or extend the period of validity of a contract.
example: We plan to renew our subscription to the financial journal next month.
exampleTranslation: Chúng tôi dự định gia hạn đăng ký tạp chí tài chính vào tháng tới.

definition: Held in common by two or more parties; shared.
example: The partnership was dissolved by mutual consent.
exampleTranslation: Quan hệ đối tác đã được giải thể bằng sự đồng ý của cả hai bên.

definition: A disagreement, argument, or debate.
example: The company resolved the contract dispute out of court.
exampleTranslation: Công ty đã giải quyết tranh chấp hợp đồng ngoài tòa án.

definition: Settle or find a solution to a problem or dispute.
example: Our customer support team is trained to resolve complaints quickly.
exampleTranslation: Đội ngũ hỗ trợ khách hàng của chúng tôi được đào tạo để giải quyết khiếu nại nhanh chóng.

definition: An agreement or a settlement of a dispute that is reached by each side making concessions.
example: After hours of negotiation, both sides finally reached a compromise.
exampleTranslation: Sau nhiều giờ đàm phán, hai bên cuối cùng đã đạt được sự thỏa hiệp.

definition: A list of items to be discussed at a formal meeting.
definitionNative: Chương trình nghị sự, lịch trình họp
example: The budget review is the first item on the agenda for this afternoon's board meeting.
exampleTranslation: Đánh giá ngân sách là mục đầu tiên trong chương trình nghị sự cho cuộc họp hội đồng quản trị chiều nay.

definition: To entrust a task or responsibility to another person, typically one who is less senior.
definitionNative: Ủy thác, giao việc, phân quyền
example: An effective manager knows how to delegate work to team members.
exampleTranslation: Một người quản lý hiệu quả biết cách ủy thác công việc cho các thành viên trong nhóm.

definition: Put a plan or order into effect; carry out.
example: The project team worked hard to execute the strategy flawlessly.
exampleTranslation: Đội ngũ dự án đã làm việc chăm chỉ để thực hiện chiến lược một cách hoàn hảo.

definition: A piece of written, printed, or electronic matter that provides information or evidence.
example: Please sign and return the attached document as soon as possible.
exampleTranslation: Vui lòng ký và gửi lại tài liệu đính kèm càng sớm càng tốt.

definition: Give shares of something; deal out.
example: The secretary will distribute the minutes of the meeting tomorrow.
exampleTranslation: Thư ký sẽ phân phát biên bản cuộc họp vào ngày mai.

definition: Perform a series of mechanical or chemical operations on something in order to change or preserve it.
example: It takes three business days to process a visa application.
exampleTranslation: Mất ba ngày làm việc để xử lý đơn xin thị thực.

definition: Present a proposal, application, or other document to a person or body for consideration or judgment.
example: All employees must submit their timesheets by Friday afternoon.
exampleTranslation: Tất cả nhân viên phải nộp bảng chấm công của họ trước chiều thứ Sáu.

definition: Observe and direct the execution of a task, project, or activity.
example: An experienced engineer was appointed to supervise the construction site.
exampleTranslation: Một kỹ sư giàu kinh nghiệm đã được bổ nhiệm để giám sát công trường xây dựng.

definition: A plan for carrying out a process or procedure, giving a list of intended events and times.
example: We need to stay on schedule to finish the project by the deadline.
exampleTranslation: Chúng ta cần giữ đúng lịch trình để hoàn thành dự án trước thời hạn.

definition: Designate or treat something as being very or most important.
example: You must learn to prioritize your tasks to manage time effectively.
exampleTranslation: Bạn phải học cách ưu tiên các nhiệm vụ của mình để quản lý thời gian hiệu quả.

definition: Bring the different elements of a complex activity or organization into a relationship that will ensure efficiency.
example: The marketing manager will coordinate the launch of the new product.
exampleTranslation: Trưởng phòng tiếp thị sẽ điều phối việc ra mắt sản phẩm mới.

definition: Place or store historical records or documents in an archive.
example: We archive all financial reports in a secure server database.
exampleTranslation: Chúng tôi lưu trữ tất cả các báo cáo tài chính trong một cơ sở dữ liệu máy chủ an toàn.

definition: Get or bring something back from a place where it was stored.
definitionNative: Lấy lại, tìm lại, truy xuất dữ liệu
example: It only takes a few seconds to retrieve information from the digital files.
exampleTranslation: Chỉ mất vài giây để truy xuất thông tin từ các tệp kỹ thuật số.

definition: A piece of evidence about the past, especially in written or other permanent form.
definitionNative: Hồ sơ, sổ sách, kỷ lục
example: The company keeps a detailed record of all employee transactions.
exampleTranslation: Công ty giữ một hồ sơ chi tiết về tất cả các giao dịch của nhân viên.

definition: A written brief summary of the proceedings of a meeting.
definitionNative: Biên bản cuộc họp (thường dùng số nhiều: minutes)
example: She was asked to take the minutes during the annual general meeting.
exampleTranslation: Cô ấy được yêu cầu ghi biên bản trong cuộc họp đại hội đồng thường niên.

definition: A written message, especially in business or an office.
definitionNative: Thông báo nội bộ, bản ghi nhớ
example: The director sent a memo to all staff explaining the new parking policy.
exampleTranslation: Giám đốc đã gửi một thông báo nội bộ cho toàn thể nhân viên giải thích về chính sách đỗ xe mới.

definition: A general description or plan giving the essential features of something but not the detail.
definitionNative: Dàn ý, đề cương, phác thảo
example: The proposal provides a brief outline of the project milestones.
exampleTranslation: Đề xuất cung cấp một phác thảo ngắn gọn về các cột mốc quan trọng của dự án.

definition: People employed in an organization or engaged in an organized undertaking.
example: Only authorized personnel are allowed to enter the laboratory.
exampleTranslation: Chỉ những nhân sự có thẩm quyền mới được phép vào phòng thí nghiệm.

definition: Enroll someone as a member or worker in an organization.
example: We need to recruit more software developers for the upcoming mobile project.
exampleTranslation: Chúng tôi cần tuyển dụng thêm các nhà phát triển phần mềm cho dự án di động sắp tới.

definition: Supervise a person or their work, especially in an official capacity.
example: The manager will oversee the transition to the new accounting software.
exampleTranslation: Người quản lý sẽ giám sát quá trình chuyển đổi sang phần mềm kế toán mới.

definition: Occurring once every year.
example: Employees are looking forward to receiving their bonuses at the annual general meeting.
exampleTranslation: Nhân viên đang rất mong chờ được nhận tiền thưởng tại cuộc họp đại hội đồng thường niên.

definition: A company controlled by a holding or parent company.
definitionNative: Công ty con, chi nhánh con
example: The international conglomerate owns a manufacturing subsidiary in Vietnam.
exampleTranslation: Tập đoàn quốc tế sở hữu một công ty con sản xuất tại Việt Nam.

definition: Producing a great deal of profit.
definitionNative: Sinh lợi, có lời, béo bở
example: The real estate developer secured a lucrative deal to construct the new office complex.
exampleTranslation: Nhà phát triển bất động sản đã đạt được một thỏa thuận béo bở để xây dựng khu phức hợp văn phòng mới.

definition: An amount of something left over when requirements have been met; an excess of production or supply.
example: The government reported a budget surplus of several billion dollars for the fiscal year.
exampleTranslation: Chính phủ báo cáo thặng dư ngân sách vài tỷ đô la cho năm tài khóa.

definition: The amount by which something, especially a sum of money, is too small.
definitionNative: Thâm hụt, số tiền thiếu hụt
example: The agency must reduce spending to cut down the growing trade deficit.
exampleTranslation: Cơ quan phải giảm chi tiêu để cắt giảm thâm hụt thương mại đang ngày càng gia tăng.

definition: An official inspection of an individual's or organization's accounts, typically by an independent body.
definitionNative: Kiểm toán, kiểm tra sổ sách
example: The annual tax audit took place in the accounting department last week.
exampleTranslation: Cuộc kiểm toán thuế hàng năm đã diễn ra tại bộ phận kế toán vào tuần trước.

definition: Relating to government revenue, especially taxes, or financial matters in general.
definitionNative: Thuộc tài chính, thuộc ngân khố
example: The company's fiscal year ends on December 31st.
exampleTranslation: Năm tài chính của công ty kết thúc vào ngày 31 tháng 12.

definition: A useful or valuable quality, person, or thing; property owned by a person or company.
example: The company's intellectual property is its most valuable asset.
exampleTranslation: Sở hữu trí tuệ của công ty là tài sản giá trị nhất của nó.

definition: The state of being responsible for something, especially by law; a thing for which someone is responsible, especially a debt.
definitionNative: Nghĩa vụ pháp lý, nợ phải trả
example: The business partners have limited liability under the new agreement.
exampleTranslation: Các đối tác kinh doanh có trách nhiệm hữu hạn theo thỏa thuận mới.

definition: Income, especially when of a company or organization and of a substantial nature.
example: Advertising revenue has increased significantly since the website redesign.
exampleTranslation: Doanh thu quảng cáo đã tăng lên đáng kể kể từ khi thiết kế lại trang web.

definition: The cost required for something; the money spent on something.
example: Travel expenses will be reimbursed by the company if you provide receipts.
exampleTranslation: Chi phí đi lại sẽ được công ty thanh toán lại nếu bạn cung cấp hóa đơn.

definition: Determine the amount or number of something mathematically.
example: We need to calculate the total manufacturing cost before setting the retail price.
exampleTranslation: Chúng ta cần tính toán tổng chi phí sản xuất trước khi thiết lập giá bán lẻ.

definition: Put money into financial schemes, shares, property, or a commercial venture with the expectation of achieving a profit.
example: The firm decided to invest in new manufacturing equipment to speed up production.
exampleTranslation: Công ty đã quyết định đầu tư vào thiết bị sản xuất mới để tăng tốc độ sản xuất.

definition: Distribute resources or duties for a particular purpose.
example: The board will allocate additional funds to the research and development department.
exampleTranslation: Ban giám đốc sẽ phân bổ thêm tiền quỹ cho bộ phận nghiên cứu và phát triển.

definition: Form an idea of the amount, number, or value of; assess.
example: The finance team will evaluate the profitability of the new store project.
exampleTranslation: Nhóm tài chính sẽ đánh giá khả năng sinh lời của dự án cửa hàng mới.

definition: Estimate or forecast something on the basis of present trends.
example: Financial analysts project a 5% growth in sales for the next quarter.
exampleTranslation: Các nhà phân tích tài chính dự báo doanh số bán hàng sẽ tăng trưởng 5% trong quý tới.

definition: Repay a person who has spent or lost money.
definitionNative: Hoàn lại, hoàn tiền, thanh toán lại
example: The accounting office will reimburse your hotel expenses within one week.
exampleTranslation: Văn phòng kế toán sẽ hoàn lại chi phí khách sạn của bạn trong vòng một tuần.

definition: A list of goods sent or services provided, with a statement of the sum due for these; a bill.
definitionNative: Hóa đơn yêu cầu thanh toán
example: Please send the invoice directly to the finance office for processing.
exampleTranslation: Vui lòng gửi hóa đơn trực tiếp đến văn phòng tài chính để xử lý.

definition: Fail to fulfill an obligation, especially to repay a loan or to appear in a court of law.
definitionNative: Vỡ nợ, không trả được nợ đúng hạn
example: If the client defaults on the payment, the contract will be suspended.
exampleTranslation: If the client defaults on the payment, the contract will be suspended.

definition: A range of investments held by a person or organization.
definitionNative: Danh mục đầu tư, hồ sơ năng lực
example: He decided to diversify his investment portfolio by buying tech stocks.
exampleTranslation: Anh ấy quyết định đa dạng hóa danh mục đầu tư của mình bằng cách mua cổ phiếu công nghệ.

definition: Introducing new ideas or methods; original and creative.
definitionNative: Sáng tạo, đổi mới, có tính đột phá
example: The company is famous for its innovative product designs and clever marketing.
exampleTranslation: Công ty nổi tiếng với các thiết kế sản phẩm sáng tạo và tiếp thị thông minh.

definition: Relating to the identification of long-term or overall aims and interests and the means of achieving them.
example: Opening an e-commerce channel was a strategic move to boost global sales.
exampleTranslation: Mở một kênh thương mại điện tử là một bước đi chiến lược nhằm thúc đẩy doanh số bán hàng toàn cầu.

definition: A type of product manufactured by a particular company under a particular name.
example: We need to raise brand awareness among younger consumers.
exampleTranslation: Chúng ta cần nâng cao nhận thức về thương hiệu đối với những người tiêu dùng trẻ tuổi hơn.

definition: An organized course of action to achieve a particular goal, especially in marketing.
example: Our online advertising campaign generated thousands of new leads.
exampleTranslation: Chiến dịch quảng cáo trực tuyến của chúng tôi đã tạo ra hàng ngàn khách hàng tiềm năng mới.

definition: Support or encourage; publicize or advertise a product or feature.
definitionNative: Quảng bá, khuyến mại, thăng chức
example: The supermarket hired extra staff to promote the new organic juice.
exampleTranslation: Siêu thị đã thuê thêm nhân viên để quảng bá nước ép hữu cơ mới.

definition: Examine methodically and in detail the constitution or structure of something, especially information.
example: The agency was hired to analyze target market trends.
exampleTranslation: Cơ quan đã được thuê để phân tích xu hướng thị trường mục tiêu.

definition: A person, object, or place selected as the aim of an attack or focus of attention.
definitionNative: Mục tiêu, đối tượng hướng tới
example: Young professionals are our primary target audience for the new app.
exampleTranslation: Các chuyên gia trẻ tuổi là khán giả mục tiêu chính của chúng tôi cho ứng dụng mới.

definition: Information about reactions to a product, a person's performance of a task, etc. used as a basis for improvement.
definitionNative: Ý kiến phản hồi, nhận xét
example: We gathered valuable feedback from our beta test users.
exampleTranslation: Chúng tôi đã thu thập được những ý kiến phản hồi có giá trị từ những người dùng thử nghiệm beta của mình.

definition: Start or set in motion an activity or enterprise; introduce a new product to the public.
example: The company plans to launch its new smartphone line next autumn.
exampleTranslation: Công ty có kế hoạch ra mắt dòng điện thoại thông minh mới vào mùa thu tới.

definition: The action of sharing something out among a number of recipients; the commercial marketing and transporting of goods.
definitionNative: Sự phân phối, kênh phân phối
example: Our distribution network covers all major provinces in the country.
exampleTranslation: Mạng lưới phân phối của chúng tôi bao phủ tất cả các tỉnh thành lớn trong nước.

definition: Describe or draw attention to a product, service, or event in a public medium in order to promote sales.
example: They decided to advertise the job opening in the local newspaper.
exampleTranslation: Họ quyết định quảng cáo việc tuyển dụng trên tờ báo địa phương.

definition: A person who purchases goods and services for personal use.
example: Consumer confidence has dropped due to the rising inflation rate.
exampleTranslation: Niềm tin của người tiêu dùng đã sụt giảm do tỷ lệ lạm phát gia tăng.

definition: A consumer's desire and willingness to pay a price for a specific good or service.
example: There is a high demand for energy-efficient vehicles these days.
exampleTranslation: Hiện nay đang có nhu cầu cao đối với các phương tiện tiết kiệm năng lượng.

definition: Each of the parts into which something is or may be divided; a group of consumers.
example: We are trying to capture a new market segment with our low-cost service.
exampleTranslation: Chúng tôi đang cố gắng chiếm lĩnh một phân khúc thị trường mới bằng dịch vụ chi phí thấp của mình.

definition: The sale of goods to the public in relatively small quantities for use or consumption rather than for resale.
example: The retail prices of organic vegetables have remained stable.
exampleTranslation: Giá bán lẻ rau hữu cơ vẫn duy trì ở mức ổn định.

definition: The selling of goods in large quantities to be retailed by others.
example: Buying in bulk at wholesale prices can save the company money.
exampleTranslation: Mua số lượng lớn với giá bán sỉ có thể tiết kiệm tiền cho công ty.

definition: A small book or magazine containing pictures and information about a product or service.
definitionNative: Sách nhỏ quảng cáo, tờ gấp
example: The travel agency printed a colorful brochure showcasing tourist destinations.
exampleTranslation: Công ty du lịch đã in một tờ gấp nhiều màu sắc giới thiệu các điểm đến du lịch.

definition: A symbol or other small design adopted by an organization to identify its products.
example: The company logo features a bright blue bird representing freedom.
exampleTranslation: Logo của công ty có hình một chú chim màu xanh sáng đại diện cho sự tự do.

definition: A general direction in which something is developing or changing.
example: The marketing report highlights the current trends in digital purchasing.
exampleTranslation: Báo cáo tiếp thị nhấn mạnh các xu hướng hiện tại trong mua sắm kỹ thuật số.

definition: Make as large or great as possible.
example: Our primary objective is to maximize profit margins over the next fiscal year.
exampleTranslation: Our primary objective is to maximize profit margins over the next fiscal year.

definition: Happening or arriving late.
example: Due to severe weather conditions, the cargo ship arrival was delayed by two days.
exampleTranslation: Due to severe weather conditions, the cargo ship arrival was delayed by two days.

definition: The official department that administers and collects duties on imported goods.
example: All international shipments must pass through customs inspection.
exampleTranslation: All international shipments must pass through customs inspection.

definition: A line separating two political or geographical areas, especially countries.
example: Trucks were queued at the national border waiting for cargo clearance.
exampleTranslation: Trucks were queued at the national border waiting for cargo clearance.

definition: A batch of goods destined for or delivered to a customer or store.
example: We received a large shipment of replacement computer monitors yesterday.
exampleTranslation: We received a large shipment of replacement computer monitors yesterday.

definition: Reach a destination at the end of a journey or stage.
example: The courier is expected to arrive at the office before noon.
exampleTranslation: The courier is expected to arrive at the office before noon.

definition: Leave, especially on a journey.
example: The train is scheduled to depart from platform 3 at exactly 2 PM.
exampleTranslation: The train is scheduled to depart from platform 3 at exactly 2 PM.

definition: Take or carry people or goods from one place to another by means of a vehicle, aircraft, or ship.
example: Containers are used to transport goods safely across the oceans.
exampleTranslation: Containers are used to transport goods safely across the oceans.

definition: Goods carried on a ship, aircraft, or motor vehicle.
definitionNative: Hàng hóa (chở trên tàu, máy bay)
example: The plane carried a cargo of medical supplies to the disaster area.
exampleTranslation: The plane carried a cargo of medical supplies to the disaster area.

definition: Bring and hand over a letter, parcel, or goods to the proper recipient.
example: The local restaurant will deliver hot meals to your office door.
exampleTranslation: The local restaurant will deliver hot meals to your office door.

definition: Follow the course or trail of someone or something; check status of shipment.
example: Customers can track their orders in real time using the tracking number.
exampleTranslation: Customers can track their orders in real time using the tracking number.

definition: Send off to a destination or for a purpose.
definitionNative: Gửi đi, phái đi, điều phối
example: The warehouse will dispatch the ordered goods early tomorrow morning.
exampleTranslation: The warehouse will dispatch the ordered goods early tomorrow morning.

definition: A complete list of items such as property, goods in stock, or the contents of a building.
definitionNative: Hàng tồn kho, bảng kiểm kê
example: We perform a full inventory check twice a year to verify stock levels.
exampleTranslation: We perform a full inventory check twice a year to verify stock levels.

definition: A large building where raw materials or manufactured goods may be stored before their export or distribution.
example: The company built a new automated warehouse near the shipping port.
exampleTranslation: The company built a new automated warehouse near the shipping port.

definition: A person or company that undertakes the professional transport of goods or passengers.
definitionNative: Nhà vận chuyển, hãng vận tải
example: We need to select a reliable shipping carrier for our international deliveries.
exampleTranslation: We need to select a reliable shipping carrier for our international deliveries.

definition: Goods transported by truck, train, ship, or aircraft.
definitionNative: Cước phí vận chuyển, hàng hóa
example: The freight charges for shipping by air are much higher than by sea.
exampleTranslation: The freight charges for shipping by air are much higher than by sea.

definition: The carrying of people or things from one place to another; period of travel.
definitionNative: Sự quá cảnh, sự đi qua
example: The goods were damaged in transit between the factory and the warehouse.
exampleTranslation: The goods were damaged in transit between the factory and the warehouse.

definition: Existing or occurring within a particular country; not foreign or international.
example: The government aims to promote domestic manufacturing industries.
exampleTranslation: The government aims to promote domestic manufacturing industries.

definition: Bring goods or services into a country from abroad for sale.
example: We import coffee beans from South America to roast locally.
exampleTranslation: We import coffee beans from South America to roast locally.

definition: Send goods or services to another country for sale.
example: Vietnam is one of the top countries that export rice globally.
exampleTranslation: Vietnam is one of the top countries that export rice globally.

definition: Make a formal statement of taxable goods at customs border.
definitionNative: Khai báo (thuế, hàng hóa hải quan)
example: You must declare any electronic devices worth more than $1000 at the airport customs.
exampleTranslation: You must declare any electronic devices worth more than $1000 at the airport customs.

definition: Break off a meeting, legal case, or game with the intention of resuming it later.
example: The chairman decided to adjourn the meeting until tomorrow morning.
exampleTranslation: The chairman decided to adjourn the meeting until tomorrow morning.

definition: Come or bring together for a meeting or activity; assemble.
example: The committee will convene a special session next Tuesday to discuss the budget.
exampleTranslation: The committee will convene a special session next Tuesday to discuss the budget.

definition: Hold a group discussion to produce ideas.
definitionNative: Động não, phát kiến ý tưởng
example: We gathered the marketing team to brainstorm names for the new product.
exampleTranslation: We gathered the marketing team to brainstorm names for the new product.

definition: Give a speech, demonstration, or lecture to an audience.
example: The sales director will present the annual marketing plan to the investors.
exampleTranslation: The sales director will present the annual marketing plan to the investors.

definition: A single page of a presentation created with software like PowerPoint.
example: Please refer to the third slide of my presentation for the comparison chart.
exampleTranslation: Please refer to the third slide of my presentation for the comparison chart.

definition: A small platform on which a person may stand to be seen by an audience, as when making a speech.
example: The speaker stepped up to the podium and adjusted the microphone.
exampleTranslation: The speaker stepped up to the podium and adjusted the microphone.

definition: The place where something happens, especially an organized event such as a concert, conference, or sports competition.
definitionNative: Địa điểm tổ chức (sự kiện, hội nghị)
example: The hotel grand ballroom is the perfect venue for the corporate conference.
exampleTranslation: The hotel grand ballroom is the perfect venue for the corporate conference.

definition: A conference or other meeting for discussion or training.
example: The accounting firm is organizing a seminar on the new tax laws.
exampleTranslation: The accounting firm is organizing a seminar on the new tax laws.

definition: A central theme; or a main speech given at a conference.
definitionNative: Bài phát biểu chủ đạo, diễn văn chính
example: The founder of the tech company delivered the keynote address at the summit.
exampleTranslation: The founder of the tech company delivered the keynote address at the summit.

definition: The assembled spectators or listeners at a public event such as a play, film, concert, or meeting.
example: The speaker engaged the audience with several interesting case studies.
exampleTranslation: The speaker engaged the audience with several interesting case studies.

definition: Take part in an action or event.
example: All staff members are encouraged to participate in the charity marathon.
exampleTranslation: All staff members are encouraged to participate in the charity marathon.

definition: Characterized by constant change, activity, or progress; positive and active attitude.
example: We are looking for a dynamic sales representative to lead the new campaign.
exampleTranslation: We are looking for a dynamic sales representative to lead the new campaign.

definition: The arrangement of and relations between the parts or elements of something complex.
example: The presentation was logical and followed a clear structure.
exampleTranslation: The presentation was logical and followed a clear structure.

definition: Make a statement or situation less confusing and more clearly comprehensible.
example: Could you please clarify the target delivery date for the project?
exampleTranslation: Could you please clarify the target delivery date for the project?

definition: Give a brief statement of the main points of something.
example: Before closing the meeting, let me summarize the main decisions we made.
exampleTranslation: Before closing the meeting, let me summarize the main decisions we made.

definition: Put forward an idea or plan for consideration or discussion by others.
example: I propose that we conduct a marketing survey before launching the website.
exampleTranslation: I propose that we conduct a marketing survey before launching the website.

definition: Formally support a nomination or resolution before it is put to a vote.
definitionNative: Tán thành, ủng hộ (ý kiến trong cuộc họp)
example: The board member decided to second the motion to expand the budget.
exampleTranslation: The board member decided to second the motion to expand the budget.

definition: Give a formal expression of opinion or choice on a subject or candidate.
example: The directors will vote on the proposed merger during the next session.
exampleTranslation: The directors will vote on the proposed merger during the next session.

definition: A general agreement.
definitionNative: Sự đồng lòng, sự nhất trí
example: It was difficult to reach a consensus due to the conflicting viewpoints.
exampleTranslation: It was difficult to reach a consensus due to the conflicting viewpoints.

definition: Cause or arrange for something to take place at a time later than that first planned.
example: We had to postpone the product presentation because the prototype was not ready.
exampleTranslation: We had to postpone the product presentation because the prototype was not ready.

definition: A point where two systems, subjects, organizations, etc. meet and interact; layout of software.
example: The software user interface is simple and easy to navigate.
exampleTranslation: The software user interface is simple and easy to navigate.

definition: To put a decision, plan, or agreement into effect.
definitionNative: Thi hành, thực hiện, áp dụng
example: The board voted to implement the new safety regulations starting next month.
exampleTranslation: The board voted to implement the new safety regulations starting next month.

definition: Designed to be practical and useful, rather than attractive; in working order.
definitionNative: Hoạt động được, có chức năng
example: The website is now fully functional after the recent database update.
exampleTranslation: The website is now fully functional after the recent database update.

definition: A person or company that creates computer software or applications.
definitionNative: Lập trình viên, nhà phát triển
example: The senior developer fixed the critical login bug within ten minutes.
exampleTranslation: The senior developer fixed the critical login bug within ten minutes.

definition: Identify and remove errors from computer hardware or software.
definitionNative: Gỡ lỗi, tìm lỗi lập trình
example: Software engineers spent all night trying to debug the checkout process.
exampleTranslation: Software engineers spent all night trying to debug the checkout process.

definition: Program instructions written in computer languages.
example: The developer wrote clean code that is easy to maintain.
exampleTranslation: The developer wrote clean code that is easy to maintain.

definition: A computer or computer program which manages access to a centralized resource or service in a network.
example: The company server went offline temporarily due to power maintenance.
exampleTranslation: The company server went offline temporarily due to power maintenance.

definition: A structured set of data held in a computer, especially one that is accessible in various ways.
example: We stored all user profile records in a secure database.
exampleTranslation: We stored all user profile records in a secure database.

definition: Move software or applications into a position for active use; publish live.
definitionNative: Triển khai, đưa lên (hệ thống live)
example: The DevOps team plans to deploy the new platform version tonight.
exampleTranslation: The DevOps team plans to deploy the new platform version tonight.

definition: Make the best or most effective use of a situation or resource; speed up code.
example: We need to optimize the web images to decrease page loading time.
exampleTranslation: We need to optimize the web images to decrease page loading time.

definition: Adjust in size, amount, or production level, especially to increase capability.
example: Cloud computing allows startups to scale their infrastructure easily.
exampleTranslation: Cloud computing allows startups to scale their infrastructure easily.

definition: Protected against attack or other criminal activity.
example: Make sure you are using a secure internet connection before entering passwords.
exampleTranslation: Make sure you are using a secure internet connection before entering passwords.

definition: Convert information or data into a coded form.
example: We encode video uploads into different resolutions automatically.
exampleTranslation: We encode video uploads into different resolutions automatically.

definition: Convert information or data into cipher or code, especially to prevent unauthorized access.
example: The security system will encrypt all passwords before storing them.
exampleTranslation: The security system will encrypt all passwords before storing them.

definition: Analyze a string or text into logical syntactic components.
definitionNative: Phân tích cú pháp, trích xuất dữ liệu
example: We use the library to parse CSV documents uploaded by administrators.
exampleTranslation: We use the library to parse CSV documents uploaded by administrators.

definition: The way in which something is arranged or set out.
example: The database exports data in JSON format.
exampleTranslation: The database exports data in JSON format.

definition: Make something more modern or up to date by adding new information or features.
example: Please update your operating system to patch security vulnerabilities.
exampleTranslation: Please update your operating system to patch security vulnerabilities.

definition: Raise something to a higher standard, in particular improve computer equipment or software.
example: The company decided to upgrade all office workstations with extra RAM.
exampleTranslation: The company decided to upgrade all office workstations with extra RAM.

definition: A state in which two things are able to exist or occur together without problems or conflict.
definitionNative: Sự tương thích, tính tương thích
example: The IT technician checked the compatibility of the new hardware with older systems.
exampleTranslation: The IT technician checked the compatibility of the new hardware with older systems.

definition: The means or opportunity to approach or enter a place; permission to use resources.
definitionNative: Sự truy cập, quyền tiếp cận
example: Employees are granted access to the building using their ID badges.
exampleTranslation: Employees are granted access to the building using their ID badges.

definition: Seek information or advice from someone, especially an expert.
definitionNative: Tham khảo ý kiến, tư vấn, hỏi ý kiến
example: You should consult a physician if the symptoms persist.
exampleTranslation: You should consult a physician if the symptoms persist.

definition: Identify the nature of an illness or other problem by examination of the symptoms.
example: The specialist was able to diagnose the rare skin condition immediately.
exampleTranslation: The specialist was able to diagnose the rare skin condition immediately.

definition: Authorize the use of a medicine or treatment for someone, especially in writing.
example: The doctor chose to prescribe a mild antibiotic for the infection.
exampleTranslation: The doctor chose to prescribe a mild antibiotic for the infection.

definition: An establishment or hospital department where outpatients are given medical treatment or advice.
example: The local community clinic offers free dental checks on Saturdays.
exampleTranslation: The local community clinic offers free dental checks on Saturdays.

definition: The condition of being protected from or unlikely to cause danger, risk, or injury.
example: The factory supervisor strictly inspects the safety equipment daily.
exampleTranslation: The factory supervisor strictly inspects the safety equipment daily.

definition: A rule or directive made and maintained by an authority.
example: New safety regulations were introduced after the industrial accident.
exampleTranslation: New safety regulations were introduced after the industrial accident.

definition: A course or principle of action adopted or proposed by an organization or individual.
example: The company health insurance policy covers critical illnesses.
exampleTranslation: The company health insurance policy covers critical illnesses.

definition: A serious, unexpected, and often dangerous situation requiring immediate action.
example: Dial the local emergency hotline if someone is severely injured.
exampleTranslation: Dial the local emergency hotline if someone is severely injured.

definition: Conditions or practices conducive to maintaining health and preventing disease, especially through cleanliness.
definitionNative: Vệ sinh phòng bệnh, vệ sinh cá nhân
example: Kitchen staff must maintain high standards of personal hygiene.
exampleTranslation: Kitchen staff must maintain high standards of personal hygiene.

definition: An advantage or profit gained from something; payments made under insurance plan.
example: Employees receive comprehensive health insurance benefits.
exampleTranslation: Employees receive comprehensive health insurance benefits.

definition: The treatment of an issue by the media; or the amount of risk or liability covered by insurance.
definitionNative: Mức bảo hiểm, phạm vi chi trả bảo hiểm
example: You must check the insurance coverage options before booking the medical procedure.
exampleTranslation: You must check the insurance coverage options before booking the medical procedure.

definition: An amount to be paid for a contract of insurance.
definitionNative: Phí bảo hiểm, tiền thưởng thêm
example: Monthly insurance premiums depend on the client's age and health records.
exampleTranslation: Monthly insurance premiums depend on the client's age and health records.

definition: A formal request to an insurance company asking for a payment based on the terms of the insurance policy.
example: The insurance company processed the claim within five business days.
exampleTranslation: The insurance company processed the claim within five business days.

definition: Give medical care or attention to someone, or deal with a disease.
example: Antibiotics are used to treat bacterial infections.
exampleTranslation: Antibiotics are used to treat bacterial infections.

definition: The state of something with regard to its appearance, quality, or working order; state of health.
definitionNative: Tình trạng sức khỏe, điều kiện
example: The patient's condition has stabilized after the emergency operation.
exampleTranslation: The patient's condition has stabilized after the emergency operation.

definition: Keep something from happening or arising.
example: Regular physical exercise can prevent many chronic cardiovascular illnesses.
exampleTranslation: Regular physical exercise can prevent many chronic cardiovascular illnesses.

definition: Relating to the body as opposed to the mind.
definitionNative: Thuộc thể chất, thuộc vật lý
example: The job applicant had to pass a physical fitness test.
exampleTranslation: The job applicant had to pass a physical fitness test.

definition: Treatment intended to relieve or heal a disorder.
definitionNative: Liệu pháp, sự điều trị phục hồi
example: Physical therapy is crucial to recover movements after a muscle injury.
exampleTranslation: Physical therapy is crucial to recover movements after a muscle injury.

definition: Return to a normal state of health, mind, or strength.
example: It took him several weeks to recover from the heart surgery.
exampleTranslation: It took him several weeks to recover from the heart surgery.

definition: Official rules ensuring cleanliness and health safety.
definitionNative: Các quy định vệ sinh dịch tễ
example: The restaurant was fined for violating food hygiene regulations.
exampleTranslation: The restaurant was fined for violating food hygiene regulations.

definition: The subjects comprising a course of study in a school or college.
example: The academic board revised the business management curriculum to include data analytics.
exampleTranslation: The academic board revised the business management curriculum to include data analytics.

definition: Required by law or rules; compulsory.
example: Attendance at the orientation session is mandatory for all new students.
exampleTranslation: Attendance at the orientation session is mandatory for all new students.

definition: The position of a student or trainee who works in an organization, sometimes without pay, to gain work experience.
definitionNative: Kỳ thực tập, công việc thực tập
example: Doing a summer internship at a major marketing firm is highly beneficial for your resume.
exampleTranslation: Doing a summer internship at a major marketing firm is highly beneficial for your resume.

definition: A specialist in a particular branch of study, especially the humanities; a student who holds a scholarship.
definitionNative: Học giả, người nhận học bổng
example: The young scholar was invited to present her research paper at the conference.
exampleTranslation: The young scholar was invited to present her research paper at the conference.

definition: Be entitled to a particular benefit or privilege by fulfilling a necessary condition.
definitionNative: Đủ điều kiện, làm cho có đủ năng lực
example: You must work at the company for one year to qualify for paid parental leave.
exampleTranslation: You must work at the company for one year to qualify for paid parental leave.

definition: A person who applies for a job or is nominated for election.
example: The hiring team interviewed five qualified candidates for the finance position.
exampleTranslation: The hiring team interviewed five qualified candidates for the finance position.

definition: Enter or record on an official list or directory; sign up.
example: You need to register online to attend the professional sales workshop.
exampleTranslation: You need to register online to attend the professional sales workshop.

definition: Officially register as a member of an institution or a student on a course.
definitionNative: Ghi danh, tuyển sinh, đăng ký học
example: Students can enroll in the advanced English class starting next week.
exampleTranslation: Students can enroll in the advanced English class starting next week.

definition: A meeting of an official body, or a period devoted to a particular activity.
definitionNative: Phiên họp, buổi học, buổi tập
example: The morning training session will cover standard customer service procedures.
exampleTranslation: The morning training session will cover standard customer service procedures.

definition: An official document attesting a certain fact, especially achievement in an exam.
example: You will receive a certificate of completion after passing the final exam.
exampleTranslation: You will receive a certificate of completion after passing the final exam.

definition: A meeting at which a group of people engage in intensive discussion and activity on a particular project.
definitionNative: Hội thảo thực hành, xưởng làm việc
example: The graphic designer led a workshop on digital brand design.
exampleTranslation: The graphic designer led a workshop on digital brand design.

definition: An experienced and trusted adviser.
definitionNative: Người hướng dẫn, người cố vấn
example: An experienced manager will act as a mentor during your first month of internship.
exampleTranslation: An experienced manager will act as a mentor during your first month of internship.

definition: A person undergoing training for a job.
definitionNative: Thực tập sinh, người được đào tạo
example: The new trainee is learning how to process sales orders in the system.
exampleTranslation: The new trainee is learning how to process sales orders in the system.

definition: Principles or standards by which something may be judged or decided.
example: The primary criteria for the scholarship include academic excellence and financial need.
exampleTranslation: The primary criteria for the scholarship include academic excellence and financial need.

definition: A thing that is needed or wanted; a condition that must be met.
definitionNative: Yêu cầu, điều kiện tiên quyết
example: Fluency in English is a mandatory requirement for this international job.
exampleTranslation: Fluency in English is a mandatory requirement for this international job.

definition: Something, typically money, awarded to someone as a recompense for loss, injury, or work.
example: The company offers competitive compensation including health insurance and stock options.
exampleTranslation: The company offers competitive compensation including health insurance and stock options.

definition: Employ someone for wages.
example: We intend to hire two additional accountants before the audit starts.
exampleTranslation: We intend to hire two additional accountants before the audit starts.

definition: The making of a judgment about the amount, number, or value of something; assessment.
example: Employees receive a performance evaluation from their managers annually.
exampleTranslation: Employees receive a performance evaluation from their managers annually.

definition: An outline of the subjects in a course of study or teaching.
example: The teacher distributed the course syllabus on the first day of class.
exampleTranslation: The teacher distributed the course syllabus on the first day of class.

definition: The teaching staff of a university or college.
definitionNative: Khoa, toàn bộ giảng viên của một khoa
example: The university faculty voted to approve the new research guidelines.
exampleTranslation: The university faculty voted to approve the new research guidelines.

definition: Communicate by exchanging letters, emails, or other messages.
definitionNative: Trao đổi thư tín, tương thích
example: We correspond regularly with our overseas clients via secure email channels.
exampleTranslation: We correspond regularly with our overseas clients via secure email channels.

definition: Cause something to pass on from one place or person to another.
definitionNative: Truyền đi, phát đi (tín hiệu, dữ liệu)
example: The satellite dish is used to transmit television signals globally.
exampleTranslation: The satellite dish is used to transmit television signals globally.

definition: Inform someone or give official notice to them.
example: Please notify the HR department immediately if your contact details change.
exampleTranslation: Please notify the HR department immediately if your contact details change.

definition: Think about and begin to deal with an issue or problem.
definitionNative: Giải quyết, hướng tới, phát biểu trước
example: The management needs to address the staff shortage issue immediately.
exampleTranslation: The management needs to address the staff shortage issue immediately.

definition: An act of formally or politely asking for something.
definitionNative: Lời yêu cầu, lời thỉnh cầu
example: We received a formal request for additional funding from the project lead.
exampleTranslation: We received a formal request for additional funding from the project lead.

definition: Establish the truth or correctness of something; verify.
example: Please click the link in your email to confirm your subscription.
exampleTranslation: Please click the link in your email to confirm your subscription.

definition: A verbal or written answer; a reaction to something.
definitionNative: Sự phản hồi, câu trả lời
example: We received a prompt response to our inquiry from the customer desk.
exampleTranslation: We received a prompt response to our inquiry from the customer desk.

definition: Send an email or letter on to a further destination.
example: Could you please forward the invoice details to the accounting manager?
exampleTranslation: Could you please forward the invoice details to the accounting manager?

definition: A flat paper container with a sealable flap, used to enclose a letter or document.
example: Please place the signed contract inside the envelope and mail it to our office.
exampleTranslation: Please place the signed contract inside the envelope and mail it to our office.

definition: The charge for mailing a letter or package.
definitionNative: Cước phí bưu điện, tem bưu chính
example: The company covers all postage costs for official documents.
exampleTranslation: The company covers all postage costs for official documents.

definition: A company or person who transports and delivers letters, packages, or mail.
definitionNative: Người đưa thư, dịch vụ chuyển phát nhanh
example: We sent the confidential files via a local courier to guarantee same-day delivery.
exampleTranslation: We sent the confidential files via a local courier to guarantee same-day delivery.

definition: Occurring or done at once; instant.
example: The system update will take immediate effect after the server reboot.
exampleTranslation: The system update will take immediate effect after the server reboot.

definition: Requiring immediate action or attention.
example: The manager left an urgent voice message regarding the contract issue.
exampleTranslation: The manager left an urgent voice message regarding the contract issue.

definition: Accept or admit the existence or truth of; or confirm receipt of email or letter.
definitionNative: Xác nhận (đã nhận được), công nhận
example: Please send a quick reply to acknowledge receipt of this email.
exampleTranslation: Please send a quick reply to acknowledge receipt of this email.

definition: Done without delay; immediate.
definitionNative: Nhanh chóng, tức thời, nhắc nhở
example: We appreciate your prompt response to our business proposal.
exampleTranslation: We appreciate your prompt response to our business proposal.

definition: An act of asking for information.
definitionNative: Yêu cầu thông tin, thư hỏi hàng, cuộc điều tra
example: Our customer support desk handles hundreds of product inquiries daily.
exampleTranslation: Our customer support desk handles hundreds of product inquiries daily.

definition: An extra part or document that is added or joined to something.
example: Please review the PDF attachment for the full conference schedule.
exampleTranslation: Please review the PDF attachment for the full conference schedule.

definition: The action of making a statement or situation less confusing and more comprehensible.
definitionNative: Sự làm rõ, sự giải thích rõ ràng
example: We wrote back to the client requesting clarification on some contract terms.
exampleTranslation: We wrote back to the client requesting clarification on some contract terms.

definition: Be an indication of; mean.
definitionNative: Biểu thị, có nghĩa là, tuyên bố
example: Signing this document will signify your acceptance of the partnership terms.
exampleTranslation: Signing this document will signify your acceptance of the partnership terms.

definition: A statement that denies something, especially responsibility.
definitionNative: Điều khoản miễn trừ trách nhiệm
example: The email includes a standard disclaimer stating that the opinions expressed are personal.
exampleTranslation: The email includes a standard disclaimer stating that the opinions expressed are personal.
